Export.Routine: ZSETUP ; for IRIS1 zn "%SYS" ;; setup SQLgateway to IRIS2 set gty=##class(%SQLConnection).%New() set gty.Name="IRIS2" set gty.Usr="_SYSTEM" set gty.pwd="SYS" set gty.driver="com.intersystems.jdbc.IRISDriver" set gty.classpath="/opt/irisbuild/jdbc/intersystems-jdbc-3.10.5.jar" set gty.URL="jdbc:IRIS://iris2:1972/USER" set gty.isJDBC=1 set sc=gty.%Save() zn "USER" do $system.OBJ.Delete("Sample.*") quit
